title: Layers UX: panel, promote-to-layer, effects, persistence

tasks.title: Layers panel: thumbnails, visibility, lock, opacity slider, drag-reorder, rename
Promote selection to layer (⌘J) using promoteRegionToLayer + renderer rasterize
Effects inspector: blur, shadow, border, corner radius with live preview, one undo step per gesture
Blur-behind recipe as a one-click action (promote→blur→promote→crop)
Copy/paste layers (within app + paste image from system clipboard as layer)
Export: PNG/JPEG/HEIC at 1x/2x, copy composite to clipboard (⇧⌘C)
